Safety System

System Online

Pharmacy AI Safety System

A demonstration of AI-powered medication dispensing safety checks. Follow all 10 steps to see how the system prevents errors and protects patients.

Identity Verification

Secure pharmacist login with authorization checks

Drug Interaction Detection

Real-time scanning for dangerous drug combinations

Prescribing Cascade Alerts

Detects unnecessary medications from side effects

Barcode Verification

Double-check every bottle before dispensing

Auto Label Generation

Eliminate manual typing and spelling errors

Immutable Audit Logs

Permanent tamper-proof records for compliance

Start Demo

Use ID PANS2024 to begin the pharmacist workflow
